name: Shrimp Tempura
recipeInstructions:
1. FOR THE SAUCE: Cook for 5 minutes until well-blended and heated through. Serve in individual bowls for dipping. You may add ginger and/or horseradish to taste.
2. FOR THE SHRIMP:
a. Shell the shrimp; slit lengthwise, not cutting completely through to butterfly them.
b. Cut across lightly in three places to prevent shrinking.
c. Wipe dry to prevent oil splatters.
d. Mix flour, egg yolk, and water gently until lumpy.
e. Heat oil 2 inches deep to 250°.
f. Dip shrimp in batter and drop into the oil. They will float when done.
g. Drain on paper towels; serve immediately with sauce.
